data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of deterministic insert/update failures on invalid ownership attempts. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the enforcement of foreign key constraints that would prevent invalid ownership attempts. The existing evidence focuses on other aspects of the saga lifecycle, such as resource creation and booking confirmations, but fails to address the specific requirement of validating ownership constraints, leading to a clear gap in coverage.
gaps: No evidence of deterministic insert/update failures on invalid ownership attempts.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
